milestones.name: Phase 1 - Foundation
milestones.description: Core infrastructure and data model setup

milestones.name: Phase 2 - UI Components
milestones.description: Build Blazor components for dashboard visualization

workItems.title: DataProvider Service Implementation
workItems.description: Implement JSON reading and caching service layer with validation and error handling

workItems.title: Dashboard Layout Component
workItems.description: Create main dashboard Blazor component with CSS grid layout for responsive display

workItems.title: Milestone Timeline Visualization
workItems.description: Implement horizontal timeline with Chart.js for milestone status display

workItems.title: Project Metrics Display
workItems.description: Create KPI cards for project health indicators and completion percentage

workItems.title: Work Item Tracking
workItems.description: Implement three-column layout for shipped, in-progress, and carried-over items

workItems.title: Print/Screenshot Optimization
workItems.description: Optimize CSS for clean output on 1280x720 and 1920x1080 resolutions

workItems.title: Cross-Browser Testing
workItems.description: Verify dashboard renders correctly in Chrome and Edge
